name: How long until I get paid after work ladder fall?

mainEntity.name: How long until I get paid after work ladder fall?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**First check 14-30 days; ongoing weekly biweekly during disability.**

Utah/Idaho: TTD starts after 3-day wait, retroactive if over 14.

- Medical paid directly.
- Delays if disputed.
- Settlements months later.

Push insurer; attorney speeds.
